creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Brian Roper from comment #7)
> Virtualbox.org indicates 6.x goes end-of-life in December 2023
6.1.50 just released: https://www.virtualbox.org/wiki/Changelog-6.1#v50
I created a patch, testing the new version on 2 of my servers now and I'll create review (https://reviews.freebsd.org) tomorrow.

7.0.14 released too: https://www.virtualbox.org/wiki/Changelog-7.0#v14
